title: ajuga macrosperma
intro: Ajuga macrosperma, also known as Bugleweed or Ajuga, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ajuga macrosperma include reducing anxiety and stress, lowering blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health.
